source_pr.title: executor: fix big_unsigned_int union decimal sign bug
source_pr.body: ## What have you changed? (mandatory) fixes #7200 and this is a bug introduced by #7112 - use decimal special logic when resultType is decimal instead of previous one type. - add test case ## What is the type of the changes? (mandatory) - Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue) ## How has this PR been tested? (mandatory) - unit tests - manual tests? ## Does this PR affect documentation (docs/docs-cn) update? (mandatory) no ## Does this PR affect tidb-ansible update? (mandatory) no ## Does this PR need to be added to the release notes? (mandatory) no ## Refer to a related PR or issue link (optional) #7200 --- This change is [](https://reviewable.io/reviews/pingcap/tidb/7202)

symptoms: tk.MustQuery("select id, v from t5 union select id, v from t6 order by id"). (executor/executor_test.go)
failure_signature: tk.MustQuery("select id, v from t5 union select id, v from t6 order by id"). (executor/executor_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it relied on nondeterministic result ordering (e.g., missing ORDER BY / unsorted assertions). Result ordering is not guaranteed unless explicitly enforced. This PR stabilizes it by: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: tk.MustQuery("select id, v from t5 union select id, v from t6 order by id"). (executor/executor_test.go)
